title: Seeds, Origins, Paths, Budgets, and Kill Policy · Go Build Room
summary: A cooperative of small public-service publishers incrementally builds testable bounded crawl charter from original deterministic HTTP, robots, sitemap, HTML, graph, and report fixtures while retaining prior Go, web, Git, accessibility, security, testing, and recovery requirements. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of testable bounded crawl charter while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal de…
objectives: Bind each seed to owner authorization, purpose, expected page class, policy revision, contact, start window, and expiry.
Define allowed schemes, ASCII hosts, ports, subdomains, redirects, and embedded resources under deny-by-default policy.
Express methods, path prefixes, queries, fragments, pagination, downloads, forms, and content types as deterministic admission rules.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Authorized site auditing and Go Commit to the mission model · Workshop Seed Record
steps.instruction:
workshop case — A workshop Go team handles case 4349 during a malformed HTML and parser differential clinic. Build deterministic Go evidence to admit seeds through owner, origin, path, method, query, budget, kill, and contact policy; release evidence binds source, modules, build settings, binary or image, configuration, policy, and restored state; then change one fuzz, race, mutation, capacity, binary, deployment, incident, restore, rollback, or residual-risk condition and reconcile release evidence. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser-service, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, x/net/html, goquery, Colly, files, processes, race, load, assistive-technology review, containers, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Bind each seed to owner authorization, purpose, expected page class, policy revision, contact, start window, and expiry.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Authorized site auditing and Go Commit to the mission model · Workshop Seed Record.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for bind each seed to owner authorization, purpose, expected page class, policy revision, contact, start window, and expiry. For Authorized site auditing and Go Commit to the mission model · Workshop Seed Record, keep Seed Record connected to executable Go authorization, URL, robots, response, tree, frontier, goroutine, report, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.
